# Claude Code Analysis

> Deep dive into the internals of @anthropic-ai/claude-code v2.1.88

This site provides an interactive analysis and learning platform for understanding Claude Code's internal architecture, tools, services, and agent execution loop. Source extracted from cli.js.map of the npm package.

## Overview

Claude Code is a terminal-based AI coding assistant built with TypeScript and Ink (React for CLI). It contains ~1800 source files, 50+ tools, 90+ slash commands, and 20+ services.

The core execution loop is an async generator state machine:
1. User Input → System Prompt Assembly → API Stream
2. Model Response (text + tool_use blocks)
3. Tool Execution (read=parallel, write=serial)
4. Results → Continue if tools called, else done

## Sections

- [Architecture](https://cc.openonion.ai/architecture): High-level system design, directory map, technology stack, and data flow
- [Query Loop](https://cc.openonion.ai/query-loop): The core agentic cycle in query.ts (~1700 lines) — context projection, auto-compaction, API streaming, tool execution, recovery, continuation decisions
- [Tools](https://cc.openonion.ai/tools): 50+ built-in tools — BashTool (AST security, sandbox, ML classifier), FileEditTool (fuzzy find/replace), AgentTool (subagent spawning), MCPTool (external tools), and more
- [Permissions](https://cc.openonion.ai/permissions): 5-layer security system — input validation, tool-specific rules, ML classifier, permission hooks, user UI dialog. 6 permission modes (default, plan, acceptEdits, bypassPermissions, dontAsk, auto)
- [Agents](https://cc.openonion.ai/agents): Subagent spawning with CacheSafeParams for zero-cost cache sharing, worktree isolation, remote execution, coordinator mode for multi-worker orchestration
- [Services](https://cc.openonion.ai/services): Compaction (4 strategies for context window management), MCP integration (470KB, 4 transports), LSP, analytics (Datadog + GrowthBook), memory extraction
- [Context & Memory](https://cc.openonion.ai/context): System prompt assembly (CLAUDE.md, git status, tools, env), auto-memory system (~/.claude/projects/), 4 memory types (user, feedback, project, reference), AppState store
- [File Map](https://cc.openonion.ai/file-map): Complete directory structure with key files — QueryEngine.ts, query.ts, Tool.ts, and all tool/service/utility paths

## Key Architecture Concepts

### Query Loop (query.ts)
The main agentic loop is a state machine that: (1) projects context (snip, microcompact, collapse), (2) auto-compacts if threshold exceeded, (3) streams API call with concurrent tool execution via StreamingToolExecutor, (4) recovers from errors (collapse drain, reactive compact, max-token escalation), (5) executes tools (read-only parallel up to 10, write serial), (6) processes attachments, (7) decides to continue or exit.

### Tool System (Tool.ts)
Every tool implements Tool<Input, Output, Progress> via buildTool() factory. Tools declare isConcurrencySafe(), isReadOnly(), isDestructive(). The orchestrator partitions tool calls into batches — read-only tools run in parallel, write tools run serially.

### Permission System
5 layers: validateInput() → checkPermissions() → ML Classifier → Hooks → User UI. BashTool has the most complex security — tree-sitter AST parsing, dangerous pattern detection (102KB), ML classifier integration, read-only validation (68KB).

### Agent System (AgentTool)
Subagents spawn via QueryEngine with CacheSafeParams frozen at fork time. Identical system prompt bytes = automatic prompt cache hit (zero-cost fork). Supports local (in-process), worktree (git isolation), and remote (CCR) execution.

### Compaction
4 strategies: Microcompact (every API call, inline), Autocompact (threshold trigger, full summary via forked agent), History Snipping (remove oldest), Context Collapse (incremental, experimental). Token budget: model_context - max_output - 13K buffer.

### Memory System (memdir/)
Persistent project-scoped memory at ~/.claude/projects/<path>/memory/. 4 types: user (role/preferences), feedback (corrections/validations), project (ongoing work), reference (external pointers). MEMORY.md index (200 lines max). Auto-extraction via background forked agent.

## Source

- npm package: @anthropic-ai/claude-code v2.1.88
- Extracted from: cli.js.map (source map bundled with npm package)
- Language: TypeScript
- UI Framework: Ink (React for terminal)
- For educational and reference purposes only
